data.title: Discovery Silver Corp. will release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 19, followed by a conference call at 2 pm ET. Webcast available.
data.description: Discovery Silver Corp. (TSX: DSV, OTCQX: DSVSF) disclosed that they will unveil their financial and operational outcomes for Q4 and FY 2025 on February 19, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for the same day at 2:00 pm ET. To participate, individuals can dial the provided phone numbers. Moreover, the call will be live-streamed on Discovery's official website, www.discoverysilver.com.
New Zealand currency slides 0.52% to $0.6014.
TD Cowen boosts RTX Corp forecast, increasing target to $225 from $210.
30-year JGB yield falls 2 bps, settling at 3.640%.

data.title: Bitwise registers Uniswap ETF trust, following regulatory probe closure; focuses on liquidity concerns.
data.description: Following the closure of regulators' investigation into Uniswap Labs, a filing has been submitted regarding a shift in focus from enforcement to liquidity concerns. This development marks a significant shift in attention with regards to Uniswap Labs, with important details and figures being addressed in the submitted filing.

data.title: Faraday Future to announce multiple robot products on Feb 4, 2026 in Las Vegas at NADA Show. Event includes EAI Robotics Final Launch.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. revealed plans for its FF EAI Robotics Product Final Launch set for February 4, 2026, at the National Automobile Dealers Association (NADA) Show in Las Vegas, NV. The California-based company (NASDAQ: FFAI) is a global leader in intelligent electric mobility ecosystems. Interested individuals attending NADA can partake in this significant event marking the company’s progression, which includes the FF EAI Robotics Product Final Launch & FX Partner Recruitment Event.

data.title: ZCG Consulting renegotiates large-scale lease portfolio for sponsor-held company, reducing long-dated lease exposure.
data.description: In New York, ZCG Consulting, a part of Z Capital Group, has confirmed the successful renegotiation and restructuring of a significant industrial lease portfolio for a sponsor-held portfolio company. This initiative led to a decrease in the long-term lease obligations within the portfolio while ensuring continuous operations at several operational sites. The project involved reducing exposure to older lease agreements and was handled by the Real Estate Division of ZCGC.
Defense ministry in Taiwan rejects TPP’s military spending blueprint as unfeasible.-SCMP

data.title: USDTL partners with CourtFact to streamline drug testing services for justice-involved programs, enhancing case management.
data.description: DES PLAINES, Ill.-- United States Drug Testing Laboratories (USDTL), a prominent player in forensic and clinical toxicology and mid- to long-term drug and alcohol testing, has revealed a fresh integration partnership with CourtFact. CourtFact, a well-regarded client management platform utilized by justice-involved programs and service providers nationwide. This partnership will integrate USDTL’s advanced lab-based and instant testing solutions into the CourtFact system. This collaboration aims to streamline operations and boost efficiency for justice-involved programs and service providers in the country.

data.title: American Bitcoin Corp co-founder Eric Trump celebrates company's accumulation of 5,843 BTC worth $520 million since debut. Stock has cratered 75%.
data.description: Eric Trump, co-founder of American Bitcoin Corp. (NASDAQ: ABTC), celebrated the company's rapid accumulation of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) since its Wall Street debut last year. Trump proudly stated that the firm has become the 18th-largest Bitcoin treasury in just five months, holding 5,843 BTC valued at $520 million. This surpasses companies like GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) and Gemini Space Station Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI). Trump emphasized that ABTC is leading the way in building America's Bitcoin infrastructure at a fast pace. Within 4 months and 22 days of being public on NASDAQ, ABTC has outpaced 30 other companies, including DeFi Technologies, which had 2,452 BTC as of September 2, 2025.

data.title: Hanmi signs deal with Mexican partner Sanfer for export of GLP-1 obesity drug, accelerating market entry.
data.description: Hanmi has recently entered into an exclusive partnership with Laboratorios Sanfer from Mexico, marking a significant step in expanding its global presence. This partnership focuses on efpeglenatide, a pioneering GLP-1 treatment developed in Korea. The agreement aims to enhance Hanmi's market penetration and strengthen its position in the diabetes treatment sector. This strategic collaboration showcases Hanmi's commitment to driving innovation and addressing healthcare needs on a global scale. The partnership with Laboratorios Sanfer signifies a key milestone for both companies in the quest to revolutionize diabetes management.
